from gullu, with her whole heart
happy birthday, bby. I love you. 💨 here is your memory lane —
because you deserve to see yourself the way I see you. you are the love of my life and my partner in crime.
you have helped me grow and evolve in ways I didn't even know I needed. you show up. always.
even when I'm at my absolute worst, you're there —
patient, sweet, understanding, respectful even when you're angry. whiny AF. but never hurtful on purpose.
and somehow that distinction means everything. you try your best in everything, every single day.
you bear with me through the bad times
and make the good times unforgettable.

your gullu, always 💨

jinx. happy birthday, giltu. 🩷 april 2nd — almost a joke. chalak lombdi. you're not. :P
